title: WED-600 Treadwell
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Treadwell}}
The '''WED-600 Treadwell''' is a large armored labor [[Droid/Legends|droid]] designed to work in [[antimatter]] furnaces. Their multi-armed, eyestalked bodies were case-hardened and could resist [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blades.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
